text: Company reports record quarterly profits and increased revenue.
Stock price plunges after disappointing sales forecast and layoffs.
The board of directors is scheduled to meet next Thursday for the annual review.
Merger between the two retail giants approved by regulatory bodies.
CEO announces resignation amid investigation into accounting irregularities.
Quarterly dividend increased by 10% following strong cash flows.
Supply chain disruptions lead to temporary factory shutdowns in Asia.
The company will host a conference call to discuss Q2 results at 5 PM EST.
Acquisition of the AI startup is expected to boost long-term growth.
Analyst downgrades the stock from buy to hold citing high valuation.
New product line launched in European markets received mixed reviews.
